title: sphaeropteris quindiuensis
intro: Sphaeropteris quindiuensis, also known as the Quindío fern, is a species of tree fern endemic to the Andean region of Colombia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Sphaeropteris quindiuensis include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in folk remedies to treat a variety of ailments.
